sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79950" key="pa/ssofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάσσοφος</orth>, <sense id="n79950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάνσοφος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πασσῠδεί</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πασσᾰλοκοπ-δί</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πασσᾰλοκοπ-δίη</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πασσᾰλοκοπ-δίην</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πανς</itype>-.</sense> </entryFree>
